Reviews Contact
Home / Services / Pool Renovations

Pool Renovations

Complete pool transformations for Miami's aging and outdated pools.

Many Miami pools built in the 1980s and 90s need updates to meet modern standards and aesthetics. Our renovation team specializes in comprehensive pool makeovers that address both function and form in our challenging environment.

Common projects include resurfacing with salt-resistant finishes, upgrading to energy-efficient equipment, adding safety features for families, and creating contemporary designs that complement South Florida architecture. We're experienced with the permitting process across Miami-Dade and Broward counties.

For historic preservation districts, we work with original materials when possible. For luxury waterfront properties, we install durable finishes that withstand constant exposure to salt air. Every project includes a detailed plan that minimizes downtime during our busy swimming season.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation to identify goals and challenges
  2. 02 Step 2: Design development with 3D renderings
  3. 03 Step 3: Permitting and material procurement
  4. 04 Step 4: Construction with daily site supervision

Benefits

  • Modernizes outdated pools safely and efficiently
  • Uses materials proven in South Florida conditions
  • Increases property value with premium finishes
  • Reduces long-term maintenance costs

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a typical renovation take?

Most complete renovations take 4-6 weeks, depending on the scope. We schedule projects to minimize disruption during peak swimming months.

Do you handle permits for me?

Yes, we manage all necessary permits and inspections throughout Miami-Dade and Broward counties, including coastal construction regulations.

What's the most popular renovation in Miami?

Many homeowners are converting to saltwater systems and adding energy-efficient variable speed pumps to reduce operating costs in our year-round climate.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with pool renovations? Contact us today.
